name: China Baoli Technologies Holdings Limited
summary: China Baoli Technologies Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the mobile technology and leisure related business in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Mobile Technologies Business, Tourism and Hospitality Business, Gamma Ray Irradiation Services, and Other Operations segments. It is involved in the research and development, production, distribution, and sale of dual-screen mobile handsets; and provision of an online travel product booking platform, leasing and management services for a cruise ship, and irradiation services through gamma ray technologies. The company also engages in the provision of securities trading and investment, asset management, and travel and travel related services. In addition, it is involved in the wholesale, import, and export of telecommunication equipment, and electronic and digital products; and computer software, hardware, and auxiliary equipment, as well as commission agency services. The company was formerly known as REX Global Entertainment Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Baoli Technologies Holdings Limited in May 2016. China Baoli Technologies Holdings Limited is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
